criterion: Sender extracted correctly from raw Enron-format email
Subject extracted correctly, including Re:-prefixed subject
Thread id: fallback tier (no In-Reply-To/References) derives normalized-subject key
Thread id: In-Reply-To header takes priority when present
Body extracted correctly, matches fixture body text
Missing optional headers (Cc/Bcc/X-*) handled gracefully, core fields still populate
Subject-normalization fallback groups Re:/case/whitespace variants into same thread key
Nonexistent file path raises rather than silently returning empty fields
